---
name: Attack report
about: Report an attack, a gap in a proof, or a needed correction to a paper
title: ""
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

## Claim targeted

State the exact claim from the paper you are attacking.

## Paper section

Name the section or heading where the claim appears.

## Description of the attack or gap

Describe the attack, the counterexample, or the gap in the argument. Include
enough detail that we can reproduce or verify it.

## Suggested correction

Say how the paper should change if the attack stands.
